content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat near 24,017 with mixed sectoral action — Pharma (+2.15%) and Auto (+0.44%) leading, Energy (-0.72%) lagging. VIX at 17.83 still elevated. Heavy book already deployed at 67%; priority is managing existing positions through a busy earnings tape rather than chasing fresh breakouts. Several held names hit 52-week proximity zones — discipline mandates trailing SLs, not piling in.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent: Position +6.1%, intraday consolidating 1043-1062 with VWAP 1054. SL at 1030 already locks in ~+4.7% above entry, current SL is 1.3% below CMP (within 1% trail-gap floor would be 1033). Keeping SL at 1030 preserves the gap and avoids a forced exit on normal chop. Q4 strong (PAT +18%, GNPA <1%). No-op MODIFY removed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.1% from 984 entry. SL 1030 is ~1.3% below CMP 1045 — within trail-gap discipline. Thesis intact (HFC, RBI easing, sub-1% GNPA). Hold for target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3%, but stock made 52w high yesterday and is now fading -0.86% intraday off 1751 high. SL 1710 is 1.0% below CMP 1727 — at the trail-gap floor. Investor roadshow May 6-12 introduces volatility. Keeping current SL — no change to stored levels (effectively HOLD)."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 240,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.6% with CMP 206.48 sitting RIGHT AT stored SL 206. Price has rolled over from 210.63 high through VWAP 207.97 and is making lower lows on 15m. Rather than wait for SL trigger and slippage, cut now near SL. Net loss capped at ~₹600. Banking sector marginal +0.40% — no rescue from sector tape."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3%, defence momentum intact. CMP 4635, SL 4600 is 0.75% below CMP — slightly tight on the 1% gap rule. BUT Q4 board meeting May 14 is in 6 sessions (just outside 3-session binary-event window). Holding current SL/target — effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, CMP 7022. SL 6960 is 0.9% below CMP — at trail floor. Q4 already printed (PAT +114%), Geojit TP 8500. Stock at lifetime high zone. Maintaining current SL/target — HOLD effective."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4%, CMP 842 down from 862 high. SL 825 is 2% below CMP — appropriate for new gap-up entry. Q4 results pending May (no exact date) — watch this. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, but stock recovered well today (+6.1%) after Q4 beat (PAT +30%). CMP 366.95, SL 358 is 2.4% below — appropriate cushion. NBFC tailwind intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9% with strong Q4 (PAT +18%, India volume +9% best-in-class). CMP 826.60 — moving SL from 815 to 820 (entry breakeven). 820 is 0.8% below CMP — slightly under the 1% gap floor but acceptable given FMCG low intraday volatility. Locks in zero-loss outcome on a beat-driven mover."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2%, CMP 3255 sitting just 0.3% above stored SL 3245. Faded sharply from 3315 high to 3250 — failed breakout off Q4 print. PV April growth (+8% SUV) trails Maruti +33% / Tata +31% — relative weakness narrative. Exiting near SL to avoid slippage on inevitable trigger; loss ~₹1,000."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1%, CMP 1278. SL 1265 is 1.0% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Q4 strong but stock 41% off 52w high; Encora deal adds leverage. Keeping current levels — HOLD effective."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.3%, CMP 3010, SL 2950 is 2.0% below. Defence cluster strong (+8.34% today). Already held HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH = defence/capgoods cluster; no additions. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%, CMP 806 with intraday range 792-812. SL 780 is 3.2% below — appropriate for gap-up name. Q4 print solid (record EBITDA margin 46.5%). Hold for 855 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.0%, gold defensive holding. CMP 124.05 recovered from 121.58 trough Apr 29. SL 119 (4% below) appropriate for ETF. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1030 already 1.3% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Tightening would force-exit on normal chop. Held."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, allow standard 4% buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 = 1.0% below CMP, at trail floor. Roadshow May 6-12 raises volatility — don't tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP 206.48 sitting at SL 206. Cut now via market order rather than absorb slippage on stop-trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence momentum intact, May 14 board meeting still 6 sessions away. SL within tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 already in print, lifetime high zone. SL at 0.9% gap acceptable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Gap-up day, Q4 pending — wider 2% SL retained."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 358.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, stock recovered intraday. SL 2.4% below adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from 815 to 820 (breakeven). Q4 strong, lock in zero-loss floor on a winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Failed breakout off Q4 print, PV growth lags peers, sitting 0.3% above SL — exit pre-emptively."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1265 at 1% trail-gap floor; 41% off 52w high keeps risk asymmetric."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2950.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence cluster member; no further tightening yet, position -1.3% within tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 780.00,
      "reasoning": "Gap-up name needs wider SL; Q4 strong; 3.2% buffer appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HFCL has a 482-min OLD pending MIS BUY at 133.50 — given MIS new-order cutoff is 2:30 PM and we're at 12:49, leaving it as-is is fine but if not filled by 2:30 it will need cancellation rather than being held into auto-square-off. WOCKPHARMA, AUROPHARMA, SRF, AJANTPHARM, LAURUSLABS, NEULANDLAB, BIOCON — all pharma/chemicals momentum, but I already hold NAVINFLUOR (chemicals) + LINDEINDIA on watchlist; cluster discipline says no fresh adds today. CHOLAHLDNG board meeting May 8 — 2 sessions away — binary event blocks entry. PNB target-cut narrative + already 5 financial-services held positions (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK exiting, ABCAPITAL, CAMS) — financials cluster already heavy.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed across 13 names. Cluster check: Financial Services = PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS (BANDHANBNK exiting) ≈ 25% of capital — at the cluster soft cap. Defence/CapGoods = HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH ≈ 20% — also full. Today's actions: 2 EXITs (BANDHANBNK, M&M) free up ~₹130k cash; one TRAIL_SL on MARICO to breakeven. NOT adding new positions today despite many tempting Q4 momentum names — cluster caps + cash buffer + 15% recent win rate argue for tightening defensive posture, not fresh exposure. Earnings season is generating dispersion; let the existing book play out. Cumulative P&L still slightly negative at -₹1,217 lifetime — focus on protecting today's +₹1,367 unrealized rather than adding new variance."
}
